Cinemo and Hyundai Mobis collaborate to enhance multimedia experiences for smart mobility. Android Automotive OS featured.
news.summary: In Karlsruhe, Germany, Cinemo and Hyundai Mobis have joined forces to enhance multimedia experiences through a collaborative showcase. Hyundai Mobis, a key player in smart mobility, has partnered with Cinemo, a leading provider of digital media products, to introduce cutting-edge technology. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the future of smart mobility. Cinemo's innovative solutions, including CARS products like CARS Connect Screens and CARS Connect Control, have been chosen by Hyundai Mobis to elevate the multimedia experience. This partnership signifies a significant step towards advancing the integration of digital media in the automotive industry.

Treasure DAO shifts focus to survive until February 2026 by cutting costs, streamlining operations, and extending financial runway. Chief contributor proposes withdrawing $785,000 from Flowdesk to boost treasury. Only 4 key products to be prioritized for revenue generation. Current treasury at $2.4 million, must sustain until February for long-term viability.-Token MAGIC down 16.5% in last 24 hrs, down 98% from ATH of $6.32 on Feb 19, 2022.
news.summary: Treasure DAO, a decentralized video game ecosystem, is restructuring to extend its financial runway to at least February 2026. Chief contributor John Patten has resumed a leadership role and proposed cost-cutting measures to reduce the annual burn rate of $8.3 million. 15 contributors have left or been laid off, and operations like game publishing support and the treasure chain will be terminated. Patten suggests withdrawing $785,000 from Flowdesk to increase the treasury and potentially extend stability until 2026. The current treasury has $2.4 million left, with the ecosystem fund holding 22.3 million MAGIC valued at $2.3 million. The DAO will refocus on four key products – the marketplace, Bridgeworld, Smolworld, and AI agent, to sustain revenue generation. Magic token, valued at $0.0872, has experienced a 98% drop from its all-time high of $6.32. Treasure DAO, launched in 2021, aims to provide game publishers infrastructure and services for Web3-based games but lacked a scalable business model post the Arbitrum airdrop in March 2023.

Bitcoin surges to $88.5K, defying bears as spot volumes rise. Concerns over tariff war impact linger. $145M liquidated, $69.4M in Bitcoin shorts. Bullish signs emerge despite resistance. Market influenced by spot buys and potential $1.5B GameStop BTC purchase. Current momentum hinges on tariff response and spot buy volumes. Potential for $90K BTC ahead. No investment advice. Conduct own research before decisions.
news.summary: Bitcoin price surged to a session high of $88,500, with the Trump administration not yet finalizing its "Liberation Day" tariffs. Key economies like Israel, Mexico, and India have rolled back tariffs on US imports, boosting investor sentiment. Bitcoin trades near a 3-month descending trendline resistance, facing rejection during past rallies. In the last 12 hours, $145 million in liquidations occurred, with $69.4 million from Bitcoin shorts. Bullish sentiment arises from firms like GameStop and Strategy expanding their Bitcoin reserves. GameStop secured $1.5B for a potential BTC purchase. The market structure seems to transition from bearish to bullish, with rising spot buy volumes at Binance and Coinbase Pro. The impact of Trump's tariffs and bullish momentum in Bitcoin price are key factors influencing the market.

Stolt-Nielsen Limited plans to relaunch share buy-back program; $30 million authorized, $21.2 million used, $8.7 million left.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) declared its plan to extend the share buy-back initiative revealed on March 2, 2016. Originally, the Board of Directors permitted the buying of a maximum of $30 million worth of the firm's Common Shares. Currently, the company has utilized $21,245,172.45 from this fund, with $8,754,827.55 remaining for future acquisitions.

New tissue bank supports medical science in UK/Netherlands. A Love of Humanity offers 365-day service for whole-body donation.
news.summary: A Love of Humanity, a tissue bank aimed at enhancing medical education and research, has been launched in Norwich, England. Operating under Fenix Biomed BV, the organization is now also available in Wales and the Netherlands. This initiative operates every day of the year, providing individuals with an opportunity to contribute to scientific advancement through whole-body donation. With a core philosophy centered around the importance of medicine, they seek to offer a lasting legacy of compassion.

WeFi Tech Group appoints Nela Mullaj as COO, EMEA & APJ. Mullaj has 20+ years in finance sector. Aims to enhance client solutions and expand.
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland, Nela Mullaj has been appointed as a key figure bringing more than 20 years of experience in the financial sector. Her notable leadership skills and innovative approaches have been demonstrated in her career. Mullaj expressed her enthusiasm for her new role, emphasizing her ambition to leverage her comprehensive knowledge of the financial industry and strategic foresight. She aims to support the company's growth and enhance client services in the EMEA and APJ regions. Her role is strategically pivotal in expanding the company's reach and providing advanced solutions to clients.

news.headline: Director/PDMR and persons closely associated disclosed transactions related to shareholdings per regulatory requirements.
news.summary: Disclosure of Transactions by Individuals in Managerial Roles and Their Close Associates:As per regulations, individuals holding managerial positions within the company or closely associated with them must report any transactions involving the company's securities. This includes purchases, sales, or any other activities that may affect the market. Failure to disclose such transactions can result in penalties. It is crucial for such individuals to be transparent about their dealings to ensure fair and efficient markets. This process helps in promoting trust and confidence among investors and the public.

news.headline: Arco Vara's 2024 annual report is released, featuring key numbers and details.

AS Tallink Grupp transported 322,717 passengers in March 2025, a 21% decrease from March 2024. Cargo units dropped by 30.1% to 20,737 units, while passenger vehicles fell by 11.9% to 47,776 units compared to the same period last year.
news.summary: In March 2025, AS Tallink Grupp saw a significant decline in transportation numbers compared to the same period in 2024. The company transported 322,717 passengers, marking a 21.0% decrease. The number of cargo units also decreased by 30.1% to 20,737 units, while the number of passenger vehicles dropped by 11.9% to 47,776 units. It's important to consider the impact of Easter holidays, which fell in March 2024, when evaluating the year-on-year changes in passenger and vehicle transportation volumes.

news.headline: Feintool secures CHF 30 million e-motor core order for China's commercial vehicles, to power pickup trucks, vans, and light trucks.
news.summary: Feintool secured a significant contract in China for e-motor cores, totaling an estimated CHF 30 million in lifetime volume. These e-laminated components will be utilized in commercial vehicles made by a top Chinese automotive maker. The stators and rotors, known for their high performance, will provide power to a range of vehicles including pickup trucks, vans, and light trucks. As more Chinese passenger cars transition to electric, the commercial vehicle segment is also beginning to see significant growth, largely influenced by the Chinese logistics industry. This contract win underscores Feintool's strong position in serving this lucrative market. Production is slated to commence in the latter half of 2025.

SWI Group appoints Strategic Advisory Board to focus on sports and entertainment. Created from Stoneweg Group.
news.summary: SWI Group has unveiled the formation of a robust Strategic Advisory Board aimed at expanding the Group's strategic direction to encompass sports and entertainment. The announcement was made jointly in London and Geneva on April 3, 2025. SWI Group, a newly established alternative investment platform formed from the merger of Stoneweg Group, is taking this step to diversify its focus for the future. The Advisory Board, comprising esteemed industry experts, will provide insights and guidance. This move is set to position SWI Group for growth and success in the dynamic sectors of sports and entertainment.

Skanska to conduct groundworks for Stockholm Exergy's new Beccs facility in Stockholm, Sweden for SEK 990M.
news.summary: In Stockholm on April 3, 2025, Skanska announced a new contract with Stockholm Exergi to construct a quay and lay the foundations for the Beccs Stockholm facility. This facility is set to be one of the largest in the world for capturing and storing biogenic carbon dioxide. The project signifies a significant step forward in sustainable energy solutions, with the construction set to commence imminently.

Lawmakers demand SEC disclose details of Trump's crypto ties due to conflict of interest concerns in enforcement cases.
news.summary: Lawmakers have expressed concern over potential conflicts of interest related to Donald Trump's ties to the cryptocurrency industry. They have called upon the SEC to provide clarity on paused enforcement cases. The lawmakers believe that this situation presents an unparalleled conflict of interest that must be addressed.
